✨ Features

Everything you need for
healthier living

🧠

AI-Powered Plans

Gemini AI analyzes your health profile to create truly personalized nutrition plans.

🌿

Tamil Nadu Diet Intelligence

Deep knowledge of South Indian cuisine — idli, dosa, sambar, poriyal, and more.

🗣️

Natural Language Input

Tell us your preferences in Tamil, Hindi, or English. AI understands all.

🏥

Medical Condition Aware

Tailored plans for Diabetes, Hypertension, Heart Disease, Obesity, and more.

📍

Regional Adaptation

Food recommendations adapt based on your region — Tamil Nadu, Kerala, North India, and more.

📊

Health Score

Get an instant AI-calculated health score with actionable personalized insights.

🍛 Regional Intelligence

Deep knowledge of regional cuisine

Our AI knows the nutritional value and cultural significance of every dish

🚀 How It Works

Get your plan in 4 simple steps

STEP 01

Enter Your Health Profile

Share your age, weight, height, medical conditions, and dietary preferences.

→
STEP 02

Describe Your Food Preferences

Type naturally in Tamil, Hindi, or English. AI will understand your food habits.

→
STEP 03

AI Generates Your Plan

Gemini AI analyzes your profile and creates a fully personalized nutrition plan.

→
STEP 04

Save & Follow Your Plan

Save to your account and track your health journey with regional food intelligence.

🌿 Start Your Health Journey
